nasb.text: I glorified You on the earth, having accomplished the work which You have given Me to do.

esv.text: I glorified you on earth, having accomplished the work that you gave me to do.

cnv.text: 我在地上已經榮耀了你，你交給我要作的工，我已經完成了。

ccb.text: 我已经完成你交给我的工作，使你在地上得了荣耀。

csbs.text: 我完成了你交给我该做的事， 因而在地上荣耀了你。
